hero.headline: Walk in unwell.Walk out with answers, the same day.
hero.subtext: {{BRAND}} is a family clinic with in-house diagnostics: OPD consultations, a NABL-accredited lab, and pharmacy under one roof. Most blood

items.title: Same-day reports
items.desc: Samples collected before 11 am are reported by 6 pm. Reports arrive as a PDF on WhatsApp and stay in your patient file

items.title: Empanelled insurers
items.desc: Cashless OPD packages with major insurers and TPAs. Carry your policy card, our front desk handles pre-authorisation

items.title: Home sample collection
items.desc: A phlebotomist visits within a 5 km radius, 7 to 10 am slots, no extra charge for senior citizens.

items.title: Transparent pricing
items.desc: Consultation and test rates are printed at reception and on your bill. No surprise line items, ever.

about.body: FreshNest Services is a local business built on quality work and word-of-mouth. We keep it simple: show up on time, do it properly, charge fairly. Most of our customers come back — and bring their friends.

items.name: R. Sharma
items.quote: Professional from start to finish. Exactly what was promised, when it was promised.

items.name: A. Fernandes
items.quote: Fair price, quality work. Already recommended them twice.

items.name: Deep Cleaning
features: Kitchens and bathrooms, top to bottom.

items.name: Sofa & Carpet Care
features: Shampooing that lifts years of use.

items.a: Yes — same-day callouts when urgency demands it.
Quotes are free within our service area.
We cover the city and nearby neighbourhoods.
